# Suggested Issue Labels

Use this as a maintainer reference when creating or standardizing labels.

## Core labels
- `bug`: Reproducible defect or broken behavior
- `enhancement`: Improvement request
- `documentation`: README/docs/template updates
- `paper-review`: Paper triage and integration discussion
- `experiment-design`: Experiment planning and protocol updates
- `good-first-task`: Low-risk onboarding task
- `blocked`: Waiting on dependency, decision, or external input
